prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph. A 10-year-old Japanese boy's bedroom in a California suburban home, mid-morning. Ren (short messy hair, wearing a game-themed t-shirt and shorts) is pushing a vacuum cleaner across the carpet. His expression is slightly reluctant but engaged — he's doing it, not happily, but with purpose. On a chair nearby, a tablet device (iPad) shows a colorful mission-style interface with a progress bar at roughly half (blurred, out of focus). The room shows the typical mess of a 10-year-old boy: some game controllers visible, a poster on the wall, clothes that were on the floor now pushed aside. Morning window light streams in from the left, creating even diffused illumination. Color grading: casual, natural boy's-room tones. Film-like desaturation. The room's colors (blue walls, scattered toys) are muted but identifiable. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. Ren and the vacuum cleaner are center-frame. The room's clutter provides environmental context. The tablet on the chair is visible at the frame edge, connecting the physical task to the digital mission. Camera: 35mm lens, f/3.2, ISO 250. Fine film grain. Carpet and vacuum texture are sharp. Old-lens softness at periphery. The mood is 'gamified responsibility' — a boy doing chores because the system made it feel like a mission, not an order. Mundane heroism.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, perfectly clean room, commercial, stock photo child, dark room, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration
